zh.lifeSummary: 當Jenet verch Dafydd於大約1365年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾多德時，她的父親Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn30歲，母親Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote17歲。她和Llewelyn Ap Morgan至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1417年在英國威爾斯享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jenet verch Dafydd于大约1365年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾多德时，她的父亲Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn30岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote17岁。她和Llewelyn Ap Morgan至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1417年在英国威尔斯享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Jenet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jennet
meanings: Either a simplified spelling of   Jeannette   or a revival of a medieval pet form of the female name   Jean .

variants.name: Ginnette
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Jeanette
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jeannette  , in the 1920s and 30s associated particularly with the Americam singer and film star  Jeanette MacDonald  (  1902–65 ).

variants.name: Jeanett
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Jenet verch Dafydd was born about 1365, in Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn, was 30 and her mother, Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote, was 17. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Llewelyn Ap Morgan. She died in 1417, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jenet verch Dafydd est née environ 1365, à Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Llewelyn Ap Morgan. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jenet verch Dafydd um 1365 in Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn 30 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote 17. Sie hatte mit Llewelyn Ap Morgan mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jenet verch Dafydd è nata il circa 1365 nel Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Llewelyn Ap Morgan. Morì nel 1417, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Dafyddが約1365年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアルhイドディンで生まれた時，父Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodynは30歳，母Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commoteは17歳であった。彼女はLlewelyn Ap Morganとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1417年にイギリスウェールズで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jenet verch Dafydd(이)가 대략 1365년 웨일스 카마테실르 히도디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Llewelyn Ap Morgan(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 웨일스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jenet verch Dafydd родилась около 1365 г. в местности ридодин, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd of Rhydodyn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Einion of Hirfryn Commote, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Llewelyn Ap Morgan. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
